name: Abjurer
skills: You gain +5 skill points in Athletics, Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
heart: You gain +1 to Fitness, Reason or Awareness.
soul: You gain +1 to Focus, Agility or Toughness.

heart: You gain +1 to Presence.
soul: You gain +1 to either Power or Toughness.

name: Alkahest
skills: You gain 10 Transmuter points. Pick one of the crafting disciplines, such as blacksmithing or alchemy. Whenever you use your Transmuter abilities in a craft of that discipline, you may add your transmuter points as bonus to that ability (even if it's not a roll). You must pick a different discipline than one you picked in Transmuter, but you gain an additional 5 points in your original discipline for free.
heart: You gain +1 to Reason.
soul: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

name: Transmuter
skills: You gain 5 Transmuter points. Pick one of the crafting disciplines, such as blacksmithing or alchemy. Whenever you use your Transmuter abilities in a craft of that discipline, you may add your transmuter points as bonus to that ability (even if it's not a roll).
heart: You gain +1 to Reason.
soul: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness. In addition, as an errand you can use Co-Craft to help in crafting once.  Only 1 person can Co-Craft with a craft at a time. When you Co-Craft, you help another crafter allowing you to use a single Co-Craft ability in their crafting session. Your Co-Craft actions count towards the 1 limit of using an ability for the main crafter.  (Both you and the main crafter cannot use the same co-craft ability in one crafting session). You must declare you are helping before any crafting actions are taken by the main crafter.

heart: You gain +1 to Cunning or Awareness.
soul: You gain +1 to Power or Agility. The food units received from your key ability is increased to 1d10 x 10 food units.
